title: Sculk V2 Elytra
description: This resource pack changes the boring elytra look to different and this is best texture for warden or sculk community one's like me
body:
Are you get tired of vanilla elytra texture?
Are you a warden fan?
Then this is a cape for you
Presenting **Sculk V2 Elytra**

it has a great design by _Foxsnapit_
With custom item texture designed by me

If you want to see/download orignal cape/elytra,[Click Here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mob-skin/sculk-cape-v-2/)
